pending_proposals.description: 90%+ confidence tier is the ONLY profitable bin in recent 100 trades (WR=53.8%, EV=+$25.37/trade). All other confidence bins are negative EV. 4th consecutive flag — ESCALATED TO PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW.

pending_proposals.inject_trigger: Human approval OR 5th consecutive flag AND confidence >= 75

pending_proposals.description: 3rd flag triggered proposal. Active rule targets 85-90% confidence band (-0.25x) but data shows 85-90% all-time WR=60.2% (+$7.67/trade). Real loss center is 75-80% (WR=45.5%, -$88.82/trade). CONF_70_80_SIZE_REDUCTION may be sufficient.
pending_proposals.status: PROPOSED — defer action until CONF_70_80 A/B test results available (bot restart required)
pending_proposals.proposed_rule: Option A: remap confidence_paradox_sizing_v1 from {confidence_min: 85, confidence_max: 90} to {confidence_min: 75, confidence_max: 80}. Option B: deactivate if CONF_70_80_SIZE_REDUCTION proves sufficient.
pending_proposals.inject_trigger: Bot restart + 50 treatment trades on CONF_70_80 A/B gate
